howItWorks.intro: This room acoustic treatment calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Coverage
rules.formula: Panels = Wall Area × Coverage% / Panel Size
rules.explanation: Total wall area times treatment percentage divided by panel area.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.q: How much acoustic treatment do I need?
faq.a: 25-40% wall coverage for listening rooms, 40-60% for recording studios.
First reflection points, behind speakers, and in corners (bass traps).
